title: NodeStateSchema
description: A SourceOS immutable-node durable state schema declaration for rollback-aware host and service state roots.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. 2.2.0.

rootPath.description: Durable or rebuildable state root. Authoritative mutable truth must not live under /usr or /etc.

stateClass.description: Semantic class of the state root.

schemaRef.description: Optional schema, contract, or URN reference for records stored in this root.

rollbackCompatibility.description: Rollback compatibility expectation for readers and writers of this state root.

mutability.description: Expected write posture for this root.

owner.description: Owning plane or repository class for this state root.

evidenceRequired.description: Whether writes to this state root require evidence emission.
